title: Economic fallout from U.S.-led war is hitting the rest of the world harder
summary_full: Because of greater exposure to disruptions in the Middle East, such as high natural gas prices, businesses and consumers outside the U.S. are being hit harder by the war in Iran.
summary_public: Because of greater exposure to disruptions in the Middle East, such as high natural gas prices, businesses and consumers outside the U.S. are being hit harder by the war in Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: businesses and consumers outside the U.S. are being hit harder by the war in Iran.
